name: quioteframework/session-s3
description: AWS S3 session backend for Quiote — a SessionPersistenceInterface implementation for SessionManager, backed by a minimal SigV4 REST client (no aws-sdk-php dependency).

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/session-s3/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
